Rythmos® Anchor Type C

Technical Specification & Installation Reference · Rev 2026

Real-time location
Alert routing
Mesh connectivity
Outdoor capable

Overview

Rythmos® Anchor Type C is a battery-powered mesh node used to support resident positioning and alert routing. It collects location data from wearables and relays information to the Gateway.

FUNCTIONS

Collects location data from Rythmos® wearables
Relays alert events across network
Maintains mesh connectivity

Key Capabilities

Resident
Location

Real-time
location via mesh

Alert
Routing

Nurse
call, fall & wander events

Mesh
Node

Self-healing
mesh infrastructure

Data
Collection

Centralized
event data in Rythmos®

Wander
Support

Supports
elopement detection zones

Outdoor
Installation

Mesh
coverage in outdoor spaces

Hardware Specifications

Dimensions: 65 × 40 × 15 mm
Weight: 35 g
Power Source: CR2477 (Replaceable coin cells)
Mesh Network Protocol: Rythmos® Mesh Network · Wirepas 2.4 GHz based
IC / Chipset: Nordic Semiconductor nRF52832
Antenna: Internal omnidirectional antenna
Transmit Power: +4 dBm max
Operating Temperature: -40°C to +85°C
Water Resistance: IP68 — sealed, dust & water resistant
LED Indicator: Status LED (onboard)
Firmware Updates: Over-the-air (OTA)
Management Portal: Rythmos® Care Manager (web + mobile)
Installation: Fixed position — must not be relocated
Certifications: FCC · ISED · CE

Network & Location Features

Forms a self-healing wireless mesh network throughout the community

Over-the-air firmware updates — no on-site servicing required for software

Passes through nurse alert, fall, and wander event data in real time

Works in concert with Rythmos® Gateway to aggregate and transmit data

Feeds centralized Rythmos® Care Manager web portal and mobile app

System Topology — Type C Deployment

Install anchors throughout corridors, common areas, and near exits to ensure full mesh coverage. Anchor density directly affects location accuracy — Intrex recommends placement every 30 ft in typical senior living corridors. Install at least 1 anchor in every room, and multiple anchors in rooms where many people congregate, such as dining rooms. Anchors must remain fixed post-calibration; repositioning requires recalibration via the Rythmos® Care Manager portal.

Installation Guidelines

Placement

-Install in fixed location
-Do not relocate after calibration

Coverage Density

-Corridors: 30 ft spacing
-Increase density in shared areas

Mounting

-Double-sided tape (tool-free)
-Screw mount (permanent)

Battery

-2 × CR2477 coin cells
-Requires no reconfiguration

Power

-Battery powered
-No wiring required

Identification

-Unique ID per device
-QR code label for provisioning

intrexis.com
